nasb.text: These were descended from the giants in Gath, and they fell by the hand of David and by the hand of his servants.

esv.text: These were descended from the giants in Gath, and they fell by the hand of David and by the hand of his servants.

cnv.text: 這些人是迦特巨人的兒子，都死在大衛和他僕人的手下。

ccb.text: 这三个迦特巨人的后裔都死在了大卫和他的部下手里。
